loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NAME , SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_CONTROL ,SC_LON_M_RULE.LOAN_TYPE_DESCRIPTION , SC_LON_M_RULE.LOAN_TYPE , SC_LON_UCF_FEE.FEE_NAME , SC_LON_M_REQ_FEE.AMOUNT ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.interest_first from sc_lon_m_contract ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_LON_M_RULE ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP ,SC_LON_UCF_FEE ,SC_LON_M_REQ_FEE
where 1=1 and SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_REQUESTMENT_NO = SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.LOAN_REQUESTMENT_NO and SC_LON_M_LOAN_REQUEST.MEMBERSHIP_NO = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO and SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NO and SC_LON_M_REQ_FEE.FEE_TYPE = SC_LON_UCF_FEE.FEE_TYPE and sc_lon_m_contract.LOAN_REQUESTMENT_NO = SC_LON_M_REQ_FEE.LOAN_REQUESTMENT_NO and SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_TYPE = SC_LON_M_RULE.LOAN_TYPE /*WHERE*/
